title: Inside the system is acting a bit weird
description: I changed some of the textures in inside_the_system to make it a bit funny.（Inside The System）
body: I changed some of the textures in inside_the_system to make it a bit funny.I changed the scary and bizarre images from inside_the_system to some very funny stuff from the Chinese internet, letting you experience a different kind of inside_the_system in Minecraft.
